name: @infiniteflight/api-sample-flight-tracker
description: Map-first Infinite Flight OAuth-only PublicApi flight tracker sample.

scripts.cf:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.check: node --check vite.config.js && node --check functions/_oauth.js && node --check functions/api/config.js && node --check functions/api/oauth/token.js && node --check functions/api/oauth/refresh.js
